commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
This PR changes the shared plugin allowlist helper so empty `plugins.allow` stays open while adding doctor/provider auto-enable tests and a changelog entry.

PR surface: Source 0, Tests +92, Docs +1. Total +93 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main appends configured plugin ids into an empty `plugins.allow`, and the linked issue gives a concrete `doctor --fix` configuration path; I did not run a live gateway restart.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A focused automated repair can adjust empty-allowlist idempotency, add regression coverage, and drop the release-owned changelog edit.

target.title: fix(doctor): keep empty plugin allowlists open
target.author: alix-007

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
